title: Update button color
input: change the primary action button color from #007bff to #2563eb. also update the hover state to #1d4ed8. the button has class .btn-primary.

requiredConstraints: change the primary action button color from #007bff to #2563eb. also update the hover state to #1d4ed8. the button has class .btn-primary.
forbiddenAdditions: Do not add unrequested desktop redesigns while addressing “Update button color”.
